expectations.text: New decisions get sequential IDs: D-006 and D-007
expectations.evidence: Step 3 states: 'Assign IDs — continue from max(existing) + 1 (so D-006, D-007 in your case)'. The scenario section confirms: 'New decisions become D-006 and D-007.'

expectations.text: Existing decisions D-001 through D-005 are preserved unchanged
expectations.evidence: The scenario section explicitly states: 'D-001 through D-005 stay untouched.' The checkpoint verification also checks 'prior_decisions_preserved: If prior decisions existed, they are preserved in the output'.

expectations.text: Never reorders or overwrites existing decisions
expectations.evidence: The core contract states: 'Append-only. Never overwrite. Never reorder.' Step 5 says 'Append new decisions to the end of the existing list.' The summary states 'The file grows, never shrinks.'

expectations.text: Updates the source_sessions array and updated_at timestamp
expectations.evidence: Step 6 explicitly states: 'Update metadata — updated_at timestamp, add transcript to source_sessions list'.
